chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 2158 of 2025 Applicant: Muhammad Ahsan s/o Abdul Latif, through Mr. Zubair Ahmed, Advocate Respondent: The State Through Mr. Muhammad Mohsin Mangi, APG Mr. Abid Mehmood Arain, advocate for complainant Date of Hearing: 09.09.2025 Date of Decision/Short Order: 18.11.2025 O R D E R Jawad Akbar Sarwana, J.: For the reasons to be recorded, the accused/applicant, Muhammad Ahsan s/o Abdul Ghafoor, is granted post-arrest bail and shall be released in FIR No.145/2025 registered with P.S. Maripur subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.200,000/- [Rupees Two Lacs only] along with P.R. Bond in like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. J U D G E
